query: What is the most recent World Bank / Argus Media monthly price of liquid sulphur Tampa in USD per metric ton for 2026? What were the values month by month January through June 2026?
answer:
## Summary

**The Tampa liquid/molten sulphur benchmark is a quarterly contract, and 2026 saw record-high prices.**

Key findings:

1. **World Bank Pink Sheet has no sulphur series** — I verified this against the most recent (June 2, 2026) Pink Sheet. The relevant "liquid sulphur Tampa" benchmark is the **Argus Media Tampa molten sulphur quarterly contract**.

2. **It's quarterly, not monthly** — the contract price holds across all three months of a quarter, so Jan–Jun 2026 breaks into two settlements:

| Month | Quarter | USD/long tonne | USD/metric tonne |
|---|---|---|---|
| Jan–Mar 2026 | Q1 | ~$495.69 (CFR) | ~$488 |
| Apr–Jun 2026 | Q2 | **$655 (record)** | ~$645 |

3. **Most recent value (Q2 2026, covers June): $655/long tonne delivered (~$645/mt) — a record high**, settled in April 2026 amid the Iran conflict and Strait of Hormuz disruption that spiked global sulphur costs and forced Mosaic to curtail phosphate output.

**Two caveats worth flagging for forecasting/resolution:**
- **Unit basis** — quoted in long tonnes; June = $655/lt or ~$645/mt after conversion (~1.6% difference).
- **Q1 basis discrepancy** — Green Markets and Argus indicate ~$495–520/lt for Q1, but one producer-cost analysis cited "$379/lt"; the authoritative Argus-settled Q2 figure of $655/lt is well-confirmed.

sources.title: World Bank Commodities Price Data (The Pink Sheet), June 2, 2026

sources.title: Viewpoint: Sulfur costs to support amsul prices in 2026
sources.snippet: Buyers and sellers project the first-quarter Tampa sulfur contract to rise to $475-520/long tonne (lt) delivered, from $310/lt del.

sources.title: US Sulfur Prices Surge as Iran War Tightens Global Supply; Tampa contract settled at a record in April
sources.snippet: The quarterly Tampa contract settled at a record in April 2026.

sources.title: Mosaic Cuts Phosphate Production as Iran War Raises Sulphur Costs
sources.snippet: Cost escalation timeline table cites Q1 2026 sulfur cost $379/lt (producer basis) and Q2 2026 forecast ~$540/lt; Tampa spot sulfur reached record highs in May 2026.

sources.title: 2026 Sulphur Price Analysis: Trends, Freight Costs & Trade Outlook
sources.snippet: FOB Middle East $525/t (Feb) to $900/t (Jun); CFR China $546.5/t to $1,075/t; driven by strong fertilizer demand, tight supply, higher freight, Strait of Hormuz risk.
